title: AGT manifest approval section
description: AGT D5 top-level approval section that configures the host approval path consulted by escalate verdicts. The engine validates this shape but treats it as opaque host configuration per SPECIFICATION.md §24.

default_resolver.description: Name of the resolver consulted by default. When absent the host approval path defaults to deny per D5. When present and resolvers is non-empty this MUST match a key under resolvers.

timeout_seconds.description: Maximum wait in seconds before on_timeout triggers. MUST be greater than zero when present.

on_timeout.description: Behaviour applied when timeout_seconds elapses without a decision.

fatigue_threshold.description: Soft cap on approvals per agent within fatigue_window_seconds. MUST be greater than zero when present.

fatigue_window_seconds.description: Window in seconds across which the fatigue counter accumulates. MUST be greater than zero when present.

resolvers.description: Named resolver configurations. Keys are resolver names referenced by default_resolver; values carry an opaque host-defined config plus a discriminating type field.

resolver.description: A single approval resolver. The engine preserves additional keys verbatim so host SDKs can consume custom resolver configuration without loss.
